name: Snake: Remix
description: Snake Remix - 3 Games in 1! Experience the classic snake game like never before! Snake Remix brings you three unique modes in one epic package: Neo Synthwave - Navigate neon-lit levels with glowing walls, combos, and pulsing beats. Can you master all 10 challenging stages? Nokia 3310 - Pure retro nostalgia! The authentic LCD look and feel from the legendary phone. Simple, addictive, endless. 16-Bit Arcade - Chain colorful fruits for massive combos! Strategic gameplay with wraparound edges and fever mode. Beautiful visuals, pumping synthwave music, and smooth controls on both desktop and mobile. One game, three ways to play!
instructions: Desktop Arrow keys or WASD to move P or ESC to pause Mobile Swipe to change direction Tap icons to pause or toggle sound Gamepad D-pad to move A to confirm
